title: Deepslate Industries
description: A grounded, progression-based tech mod for Minecraft 1.21.1 built on Fabric. Power your world using the natural strength of Deepslate and Amethyst, and rise from basic smelting to full industrial automation.
body:
# 🪨 Deepslate Industries

A grounded, progression-based tech mod for **Minecraft 1.21.1** built on **Fabric**. Power your world using the natural strength of **Deepslate** and **Amethyst**, and rise from basic smelting to full industrial automation.

---

## ⚙️ Features

- 🔥 **Upgradable Deepslate Furnace** – Better than vanilla, modular and faster with upgrades
- ⚙️ **Pulverizer** – Crush ores into dust to double your yield
- 🧪 **Pipe System** – Includes Fluid, Item, and Energy Pipes.
- 🔋 **Crystal Power System** – Store and transfer energy using Charged Amethyst
- 🧰 **Upgradeable Machines** – Slot in Speed, Efficiency, or Yield chips
- 🎨 **Blockbench-powered models and animations**
- 📦 Clean, minimal machine UI and simple tiered recipes

---

## 🛠️ Requirements

- [Fabric Loader 0.16.x+](https://fabricmc.net)
- [Minecraft 1.21.1](https://minecraft.net)
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)

---

## 📦 Installation

1. Download and install Fabric Loader + Fabric API
2. Place `deepslate-industries-x.x.x.jar` into your `mods` folder
3. Launch and enjoy the grind
